name: Umm-E-Kulsoom
overview: The story is about a middle-class girl, Umm-e-Kulsoom, who is good at singing. She is the favorite child of her mother Maryam. She is engaged to her maternal cousin Moosa but her sister Ruqaiyya creates problems for her and Moosa. Later, Umm-e-Kulsoom became a big singer and married Nihal.
